summary: Post-refactor verification of INKFLOW blog app. All 8 required flows tested and passing. Backend: 15/15 tests pass (updated to use cookie-based session auth). Frontend: All pages load correctly - homepage, login, logout, register, post detail, write, admin dashboard, profile. CSS compilation error fixed, Zustand auth migration verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: test_blog.py was updated from Bearer token auth to session/cookie-based auth to match the new httpOnly cookie architecture.
PUT endpoint returns 405 (only PATCH is supported for post updates) - this is by design in the new 4-layer architecture.
seed_data_creation: TEST_Blog Post Automation (x2 published), TEST_Update Post (draft) from backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All flows working. Frontend migrated from AuthContext/localStorage to Zustand+httpOnly cookies. Post detail URL is /post/:slug (not /posts/:slug). Backend uses PATCH (not PUT) for post updates. Admin dashboard now shows correct user/category counts on load (previous bug from iteration_1 was fixed).
flows_verified: Homepage loads with posts, navbar, categories - PASS
Login with admin@blog.com/admin123 shows Write+Admin+Profile links - PASS
Logout reverts navbar to Sign In - PASS
Register new account redirects home with logged-in state - PASS
Post detail /post/:slug loads title, content, comments - PASS
Write page /write loads editor without crash - PASS
Admin dashboard /admin loads with stats and post list - PASS
Profile /profile shows user info, stats, and posts - PASS
